title: PartyMC
body:
### **The Official Modpack for the Minecraft Live Music Event Server, PartyMC.**


**What is PartyMC?**

PartyMC is a virtual music venue hosted in Minecraft! 

We will be hosting many DJs, artists, and more. Powered by many mods to give the best most immersive experience possible

PartyMC intends to bridge the gap for people to want attend festivals or concerts that might not be able to go in-person, or afford main stream tickets. PartyMC also strives to give smaller artists, and DJs a chance to get in front of a croud


**How do I join?**

We will send out updates when new events are on the rise on our [Discord](https://discord.gg/6Yf6aeSCyK). You can download this modpack below, and the server will be open whenever events are happening.

**Trailer:**
